note: rating 1-5 (5 excellent). value_cliff pairs need an intermediate terrain or wider blend; never coincide their material seam with an elevation step.

rules_for_generator: Flag any adjacency whose base top-face value delta exceeds ~0.45 and auto-require an intermediate-value terrain or bridge tile — a feather alone cannot hide a value cliff.
Never place stone_mountain directly beside black_mountain; separate with a mid-grey scorched-rock / ash / dark-gravel terrain.
Decouple material seams from elevation terrace steps — offset the colour border from any cliff face.
Keep the harder/darker material on the up-slope side so the one-sided feather stays valid.
Default feather width +1 cell vs this test; jitter tile density along the iso diagonal to avoid picket-fence rows.

Fill each terrain ~75% CLEAN standard ground and ~25% special/accent tiles (flowers, mushrooms, bare patches, pebbles). Overusing accents makes them cheap. Classify base tiles by off-material fraction; cliff faces use clean tiles only.
